home.title: Welcome to i18n Demo
home.description: This application demonstrates how to implement Internationalization/Localization (i18n) in a fullstack application with NestJS and React. Switch the language at the top right and explore the various UI elements.

pizza.title: Order Pizza
pizza.description: Configure your ideal pizza with our various UI elements.

pizzas.margherita: Margherita - Classic tomato sauce, mozzarella, fresh basil
pizzas.pepperoni: Pepperoni - Spicy pepperoni, tomato sauce, mozzarella
pizzas.vegetariana: Vegetariana - Mushrooms, peppers, onions, tomato sauce
pizzas.quattro: Quattro Formaggi - Four cheese varieties, tomato sauce
